title: OmniProject dashboard widget
description: A dashboard widget type. One file per widget under assets/widgets/<type>.json. `type` binds to the SPA widget renderer registry (components/dashboard/widgets WIDGET_COMPONENTS).

type.description: Unique widget type; the key into the SPA widget renderer registry.

defaultSpan.description: Default column width (1–3) when first added to a dashboard.

requiresEntity.description: If set, the widget is only offered when the backend can surface this entity.

order.description: Display order in the widget picker.

refresh.description: Auto-refresh interval in seconds when rendered as a library component. Omitted = no auto-refresh.

drillTo.description: Declarative drill-down (backlog #122): turns a clicked figure on this widget into a navigation + predicate against the work-item grid. Omitted = no drill-through.

target.description: Where the drill-through lands. Only the project work-item grid exists today.

projectIdField.description: Field on the clicked data point supplying the target project id. Omitted when the widget is already project-scoped.

predicate.description: Conditions ALWAYS applied (mirrors the SPA predicate engine's ConditionSet — see lib/rate-card.ts).

predicateFrom.description: Conditions derived from the clicked data point at click-time, ANDed with `predicate`.

label.description: Human label for the resulting filter, shown in the grid's active-filter banner.
